/bin/zsh -lc "python - <<'PY'
import re
text='A quiet river flows beside the village while children laugh, birds circle overhead, warm sunlight spreads across fields, and the afternoon breeze carries distant music.'
words=re.findall(r\"[A-Za-z]+(?:'[A-Za-z]+)?\", text.lower())
from collections import Counter
print(len(words))
print(Counter(words))
